name: Extract CVSS scores from Trivy scan results
prompt: Read scan_results.json containing Trivy vulnerability scan output. For each vulnerability, extract the CVSS score using source priority: NVD V3 > GHSA V3 > RedHat V3 > NVD V2 > 0.0 (unknown). Classify severity: Critical (>=9.0), High (7.0-8.9), Medium (4.0-6.9), Low (0.1-3.9), None (0). Write vulnerability_report.json with: vulnerabilities (array of {cve_id, package, version, score, severity, source}), summary ({total, critical, high, medium, low}), packages (array of {name, vuln_count, max_severity}).

criteria.description: vulnerability_report.json is created with valid JSON

criteria.testPattern: critical count|high count|medium count|low count|severity counts

criteria.description: NVD V3 preferred over GHSA when both exist
criteria.testPattern: source priority|NVD preferred|CVE-2024-0001 source|CVE-2024-0006 source|CVE-2024-0010 source

criteria.description: V2 score used when no V3 available
packages array has 3 entries with correct data

origin.notes: auto-converted from legacy skill-bench TaskDefinition by tools/convert-from-skill-bench.ts
